CustomField.description: The next-higher geography in the rollup hierarchy — e.g. an Airport's parent City, a City's parent Country, a Country's parent Region. Self-lookup; a geography has at most one parent. Custom Groups that overlap the normal hierarchy are a future many-to-many concern, not modeled by this single-parent lookup.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The next-higher geography this one rolls up into (e.g. LHR → GB → Europe → EMEAI).
CustomField.label: Parent Geography
